sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْأَمْنُ السِّيبِرَانِيُّ أَمْرًا مُهِمًّا لِحِمَايَةِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kibernetička sigurnost se smatra važnom za zaštitu ličnih podataka.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity is considered important for protecting personal information.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا اسْتِخْدَامُ كَلِمَاتِ سِرٍّ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِسَابَاتِنَا عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo koristiti jake lozinke za naše račune na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must use strong passwords for our accounts on the internet.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَفْتَحْ أَيَّ رَوَابِطَ مَجْهُولَةٍ تَصِلُ إِلَى بَرِيدِكَ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ne otvarajte nepoznate linkove koji stignu na vašu e-poštu.
sentences.translationEn: Do not open any unknown links that arrive at your email.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْخُبَرَاءُ دَائِمًا عَلَى مَنْعِ الِاخْتِرَاقَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci stalnu rade na sprečavanju digitalnih upada.
sentences.translationEn: Experts are always working on preventing digital breaches.
